mapper.select: SELECT object_owner, object_name, policy_group, policy_name, pf_owner AS function_owner, package AS package_name, function AS function_name, RTRIM( CASE WHEN sel = 'YES' THEN 'SELECT,' ELSE '' END || CASE WHEN ins = 'YES' THEN 'INSERT,' ELSE '' END || CASE WHEN upd = 'YES' THEN 'UPDATE,' ELSE '' END || CASE WHEN del = 'YES' THEN 'DELETE,' ELSE '' END || CASE WHEN idx = 'YES' THEN 'INDEX,' ELSE '' END, ',' ) AS statement_types, chk_option AS check_option, enable AS enabled, static_policy, policy_type, long_predicate FROM all_policies ORDER BY object_owner, object_name, policy_name

SELECT LISTAGG(text, '') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY line) FROM all_source WHERE owner = UPPER(#{owner,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AND name = UPPER(#{objectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AND type = UPPER(#{objectType,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
